title: Mace Bros. Attack FABRIC
description: Fabric port of the Mace Bros. Attack mod
body:
# This mod is a port of the original Mace Bros. Attack mod 
For fabric 1.21.1 and 1.21.4+, it aims to bring the satisfying exclamations from the Mario and Luigi RPG games when you strike an enemy with a combo attack to the mace and it's Wind Burst enchantment !

Each bounce on an enemies head spawns a particle that echoes how well you are jumping, with the order being "OK", "GOOD!!", "GREAT!!", "EXCELLENT!!!"

In this version, the mod is entirely client-side !
Thanks to lexuigi for the original mod 

[https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-bros.-attack](https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-bros.-attack)
